rationale: The potential Iran peace deal and Hormuz reopening could ease energy prices for Poland; EU accession launch for Ukraine and Moldova continues as a known process with no new qualitative step.

top_events.title: Iran war: US and Tehran signal peace deal within reach, Hormuz reopening possible
top_events.summary: A potential Iran deal and Hormuz reopening could lower global oil and gas prices, offering indirect relief to Polish households still sensitive to energy costs.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: Formal EU accession launch for Ukraine and Moldova is a known process Poland supports; no new qualitative step beyond prior confirmation, so impact remains moderate.

top_events.title: UAE to unlock frozen Iranian funds amid US ceasefire push
top_events.summary: Unfreezing Iranian funds signals momentum toward a broader deal, which could further stabilize energy markets relevant to Polish consumers.
